Address.title: Address
Address.description: The address field to be populated with the Candidate's Address from the CV Document Format: Text

AppGoodFit.title: AppGoodFit
AppGoodFit.description: What makes applicant a good fit for this specific job spec Format: Long Text

AppMinRequirements.title: AppMinRequirements
AppMinRequirements.description: Format: Text Input: These are the non negotiables as specified on the Job Spec record (if any) and whether the Candidate has all the minimum requirements or not, and to be populated on the Minimum_Requirements__c field on the Application record

AppOverview.title: AppOverview
AppOverview.description: Overview of Candidate: Give a short overview of the Candidate highlighting the number of years experience, overview of their job history, and anything else that would make this a good/ bad for this fit Format:

AppRating.title: AppRating
AppRating.description: Application Rating: What would you score the applicant out of ten for this Job Format: Number

CVTitle.title: CVTitle
CVTitle.description: The title of the pdf CV Document

CandidateRating.title: CandidateRating
CandidateRating.description: What is the Candidate rating Picklist Values: Green Amber Red DO NOT CONTACT

Certs.title: Certs
Certs.description: To populate the Certifications__c field Data Type: Long Text: Extracted from the candidate's CV using Einstein's data parsing found from the Certification's section on the CV Document. Format: Write in Bullet Point Format

Company.title: Company
Company.description: The current or last company the Candidate as worked at

CurrentRole.title: CurrentRole
CurrentRole.description: The Current Role of the user

DOB.title: DOB
DOB.description: The Date Field to be populated with the Candidate's date of birth from the CV Document Format: YYYY-MM-DD IF there is no date of birth on the CV this can be ignored

Degree.title: Degree
Degree.description: From the Undergraduate Degrees/ Degree Abbreviation What is the highest Degree the Candidate has Picklist values: BEng BIS BIT BTech Honours Masters BCom BCompt Other PHD

Education.title: Education
Education.description: Data Type: Text: Extracted from the candidate's CV using Einstein's data parsing found from the Education section on the CV Document. Format: Rich Text Bullet Point Institution Qualification Year Qualified Any other information mentioned like subjects, activities, affiliations etc

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.description: Data Type: Text: Extracted from the candidate's CV using Einstein's data parsing found from the Work/ Professional Experience section on the CV Document. Format: Rich Text Title | Company Name | Location | Date from and To Bullet point of their duties, Projects they worked on, Achievements and anything else they mentioned Reason for leaving if on CV

Fname.title: Fname
Fname.description: First Name of the candidate on the CV

HowDidTheyFirstHearAboutUs.title: HowDidTheyFirstHearAboutUs
HowDidTheyFirstHearAboutUs.description: The value for How Did They First Hear About us passed through from the email fields:

IdentificationType.title: IdentificationType
IdentificationType.description: The Identification Type value passed in from the email fields

LName.title: LName
LName.description: Last Name of the candidate on the CV

Level.title: Level
Level.description: Seniority Level (Intermediate, Mid, Senior, Junior, Graduate), make a judgement call, this would be based on number of years experience, current position title etc

Name.title: Name
Name.description: the full Name of the candidate on the CV

Overview.title: Overview
Overview.description: This is a summary of the Candidate done by the Agent, summarising their overall CV. Format: Long Text Example: This Candidate is a Salesforce Architect and has 7 years Professional working experience with 5 years in Salesforce, they have a degree in Computer Sciences and 5 Salesforce Certifications

RegionApplyingFor.title: RegionApplyingFor
RegionApplyingFor.description: The Region Applying For Value given to you in the email fields

RequirementsMissing.title: RequirementsMissing
RequirementsMissing.description: What requirements/ Skills missing: where might this candidate possibly be missing or lacking for this specific job Format: Long Text To update What_requirements_Skills_missing__c field

RoleApplyingFor.title: RoleApplyingFor
RoleApplyingFor.description: The Role/s Applying For value given in the email fields of the user

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.description: Data Type: Long Text: Extracted from the candidate's CV using Einstein's data parsing found from the skills section on the CV Document. Format: Write in Bullet Point Format

Timing.title: Timing
Timing.description: The Timing value given for the user in the email fields

Uni.title: Uni
Uni.description: What is the name of the University the Candidate obtained their highest education

YearsOfExperience.title: YearsOfExperience
YearsOfExperience.description: The Years Of Experience value given for the user

recordId.title: recordId
recordId.description: This is the Candidate record 18 digit record Id of Candidate
